about.heading: About Schafer Electric
body: Founded in 2006 by owner Ben Schafer, Schafer Electric Services has become one of Sonoma County’s most trusted electrical contractors, serving homes and businesses across Sonoma, Napa and Marin counties. Every electrician on the crew is state-certified, and the company holds California C-10 license #874111.

Their standard is simple: complete every job correctly the first time. Fully stocked service vehicles let the team finish about 95% of projects onsite in a single visit, without waiting on materials — and in most cases they can provide same-day emergency service when the power can’t wait.

services.title: Panel & service upgrades
services.description: Circuit breaker panel upgrades, replacements and main service upgrades to safely meet a modern home’s electrical demand.

services.title: EV charger installation
services.description: Clean, code-compliant home EV charger installs sized to your vehicle and panel.

services.title: Troubleshooting & repair
services.description: Fast diagnosis and repair of faults, dead circuits and safety issues — for homes and businesses alike.

services.title: Lighting & wiring
services.description: Interior and exterior lighting, switches, outlets and dimmers, plus new-home, remodel and workshop wiring.

services.title: Backup generators
services.description: Residential and commercial standby generator installation so the lights stay on through any outage.

services.title: Commercial & tenant improvements
services.description: Build-outs, lighting design, low-voltage and data wiring, and code-compliance work for commercial spaces.

items.quote: Schafer Electric provides excellent, professional service. They came out once for an emergency call on a Sunday morning and again to install some lighting. They were on time, fast, and did exactly what we discussed in the estimate — no overages for time or materials.
items.author: Sonoma County customer

items.a: You'll find us at 631 Rinaldo St.
Mon – Fri: 7:30 AM – 4:30 PM; Sat – Sun: Emergency service available.
We proudly serve Santa Rosa, CA and the surrounding community.

items.q: How do I get in touch?
items.a: Call us at +17075453300 — we're glad to help.
